name: Chicken with 40 Cloves of Garlic
recipeIngredient: 3 1/2 lb roasting chicken, whole or cut into
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Sprinkle the chicken with salt and pepper to taste.
3. Place the bay leaf, parsley, celery, and onion at the bottom of a large, oven-safe casserole dish. Place the chicken on top and add the garlic cloves and vermouth.
4. Cover the casserole tightly with aluminum foil.
5. Bake in the preheated oven for 1 1/2 hours. Do not remove the cover until the cooking time is complete.
6. Serve the chicken with the pan juices and garlic cloves. Spread the roasted garlic mixture on the toasted bread rounds.
